events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May, known for his iconic riffs and astrophysics background, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, who has captivated audiences for over six decades, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock's Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger! The legendary Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today. What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, forever changing the music industry, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' famously being its first broadcast music video.

angles.name: MTV's Big Bang
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Today marks the anniversary of its launch in 1981, kicking off with The Buggles. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', in 1994, which quickly became a defining record of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Anthem
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, featuring iconic performances over three days of peace and music.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off. An incredible moment in music history. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Elvis Presley today. His music continues to influence generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot in Las Vegas
events.blurb: The hip-hop world was rocked in 1996 when Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, an incident that tragically led to his death.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur today. His legacy in hip-hop remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His guitar work still sounds out of this world. What's your favourite track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary. What's your go-to track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders and a true rock icon, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock's Leading Lady
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and presence are simply timeless. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and distinctive voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Always a character, always a voice. What's your favourite track he's sung?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' in 1971
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' in 1971, a song that continues to resonate globally for its message of peace and unity.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago today, John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song whose message is as powerful and relevant now as it was then.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple changed the way we listen to music forever with the launch of the first-generation iPod in 2001, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. Remember the click wheel and carrying 1,000 songs in your pocket? What was the first album you loaded on yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent since the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary musician, songwriter, and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're reflecting on the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python and star of Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
